question: How many goals were scored in total across the three UEFA men's club finals in 2026 (Champions League, Europa League, Conference League), not counting penalty shootouts?

openrouter:anthropic/claude-sonnet-5.answer:
Across the three 2026 UEFA men's club finals, a total of **6 goals** were scored in regular/extra time (excluding penalty shootouts):

- **Champions League:** Paris Saint-Germain 1–1 Arsenal (PSG won 4–3 on penalties) → 2 goals ([Olympics.com](https://www.olympics.com/en/news/football-uefa-mens-champions-league-final-2026-arsenal-psg-results), [CNN](https://www.cnn.com/2026/05/30/sport/live-news/arsenal-psg-champions-league-final-score))
- **Europa League:** Freiburg 0–3 Aston Villa → 3 goals ([The Guardian](https://www.theguardian.com/football/live/2026/may/20/freiburg-v-aston-villa-europa-le

openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-sol.answer:
**6 goals** in total:

- Champions League: PSG 1–1 Arsenal — **2 goals** ([Olympics.com](https://www.olympics.com/en/news/football-uefa-mens-champions-league-final-2026-arsenal-psg-results))
- Europa League: Aston Villa 3–0 Freiburg — **3 goals** ([source](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_UEFA_Europa_League_final))
- Conference League: Crystal Palace 1–0 Rayo Vallecano — **1 goal** ([source](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/2026_UEFA_Conference_League_final))

**Total: 2 + 3 + 1 = 6**, excluding PSG’s 4–3 penalty-shootout win.
